notes: IDology clears on first call -> KYC Pass.
IDology generic fail -> LexisNexis pass -> KYC Pass.
LexisNexis hard-block code -> immediate Decline.
LN non-SSN soft fail -> Persona pass -> KYC Pass.
Persona IDV fails -> Decline.
LN SSN fail -> Persona pass -> SSN Escalation; client re-enters SAME SSN -> Decline. SSN-escalation resume via client_context.
LN SSN fail -> Persona pass -> SSN Escalation; client re-enters DIFFERENT SSN -> re-run IDology -> Pass. seed1 is_sequence: 1st call fail-esc, 2nd call pass.
FAIL_SSN -> ESCALATE_SSN; client re-enters different SSN -> re-run IDology -> Pass. seed1 is_sequence (fail-esc, then pass).
FAIL_ADDRESS -> ESCALATE_ADDRESS; re-enter -> re-run IDology -> Pass.
FAIL_NAME -> ESCALATE_FULL_NAME; re-enter -> re-run IDology -> Pass.
FAIL_DOB -> ESCALATE_DOB; re-enter -> re-run IDology -> Pass.
Multiple fail categories -> combined ESCALATE_SSN_DOB (or ESCALATE_PII); re-enter -> re-run IDology -> Pass.
Re-run IDology generic-fails (2nd seq response) then LexisNexis passes -> KYC Pass. seed1 is_sequence: fail-esc, then fail-no-esc.
IDology 500 -> error handling / retry; terminal ERROR after retries.
Auth failure surfaces as ERROR (matches IDOLOGY_INVALID_CREDENTIALS_TEXT), not Decline.
delay_ms 30000 exceeds 30s client cap -> timeout/retry path.
Broken JSON via raw -> parser must not crash; terminal ERROR.
LexisNexis 503 error handling.
LexisNexis timeout.
Broken XML -> parser resilience.
Persona 500.
Persona timeout.
Persona eventual-consistency: seed3 is_sequence PENDING,PENDING,COMPLETED. Set seed3.is_sequence=true and 3 responses in the runner.
Replay same flow_id 3x -> flow_id is the UNIQUE idempotency key: exactly ONE uks_kyc_flow row, ONE event, idology called once effectively.
5 distinct flow_ids -> 5 independent flows, one PASSED event each.
Bombard same flow_id with 50 concurrent requests -> no duplicate rows/events (UNIQUE flow_id under concurrency).
